positive: A whimsical, stylized forest landscape featuring interconnected bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central element is a magnificent, oversized fox sitting upright in a patch of glowing mushrooms, surrounded by stylized winding vines, deep emerald greens, sapphire blues, and warm gold highlights. The style should be high-contrast, modern illustration mixed with Art Deco symmetry, giving it a clean, tattoo-sheet quality. The composition must be perfectly centered and contained within a square aspect ratio, ensuring the fox and key plant elements create a strong, bold silhouette suitable for apparel printing. Studio lighting, vector art finish, crystal clear lines, smooth gradients, deep negative space.
negative: blurry, low quality, noise, grainy, ugly, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, artifact, multiple limbs, extra digits, bad anatomy, out of frame, messy, dull colors, solid color background
